GameToken.Name: ActivationDist
GameToken.Description: Distance at which LabAI switches to CryAI(must be less than AggroDist)

GameToken.Name: AggroDist
GameToken.Description: Base aggro distance when standing or walking

GameToken.Name: AmbientRespawnRate
GameToken.Description: (Minutes) Time period over which ambient zombies respawn to reach desired denstiy

GameToken.Name: DeactivationDist
GameToken.Description: Distance at which CryAI switches to LabAI(must be greater than ActivationDist>

GameToken.Name: DeaggroDist
GameToken.Description: Range at which aggroed zombie loses aggro... must be higher than all other aggro ranges!

GameToken.Name: RecognitionTime
GameToken.Description: Delay for a dumb zombie to notice player when within aggro dist

GameToken.Name: AttackDelay
GameToken.Description: Delay for a dumb zombie to aggro after noticing player (ignored by "instant aggro dist")

GameToken.Name: SprintSoundDist
GameToken.Description: Aggro dist used if sprinting.

GameToken.Name: GunFireSoundDist
GameToken.Description: Instant aggro range triggered by shooting. (Eventually should be weapon/silencer based.)

GameToken.Name: CombatSoundDist
GameToken.Description: Instant aggro range triggered by attacking.

GameToken.Name: KillSoundDist
GameToken.Description: Instant aggro range triggered by a kill. (Eventually should be technique/weapon based.)

GameToken.Name: BloodLustPercentage
GameToken.Description: Chance a dumb zombie will bloodlust (fast movement) when they aggro

GameToken.Name: BaseFOV
GameToken.Description: FOV for dumb zombies to spot player when base AggroDist is in effect. (sound-based aggro ignores FOV)

GameToken.Name: ChaseCount1
GameToken.Description: Num chasing zombies to activate ChaseSoundDist1

GameToken.Name: ChaseSoundDist1
GameToken.Description: Aggro dist used if chased by ChaseCount1 zombies

GameToken.Name: ChaseCount2
GameToken.Description: Num chasing zombies to activate ChaseSoundDist2

GameToken.Name: ChaseSoundDist2
GameToken.Description: Aggro dist used if chased by ChaseCount2 zombies

GameToken.Name: ChaseCount3
GameToken.Description: Num chasing zombies to activate ChaseSoundDist3

GameToken.Name: ChaseSoundDist3
GameToken.Description: Aggro dist used if chased by ChaseCount3 zombies

GameToken.Name: HunterPercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Hunters (faster and smarter)

GameToken.Name: HunterAggroDist
GameToken.Description: Range that Hunters aggro at (within FOV cone)

GameToken.Name: HunterFOV
GameToken.Description: FOV cone for Hunters to aggro at HunterAggroDist

GameToken.Name: ChaseRadius
GameToken.Description: How close an aggroed zombie must be to add to the ChaseCount

GameToken.Name: EchoMultiplier
GameToken.Description: Multiplier - Extend the aggro range for any disturbance beyond base aggro

GameToken.Name: EchoDecayRate
GameToken.Description: Seconds - How quickly the echo goes away

GameToken.Name: EchoRecognitionTime
GameToken.Description: Seconds - How long it takes a zombie in the echo range to recognize the player

GameToken.Name: EchoAttackDelayMin
GameToken.Description: Seconds - How long it takes a zombie in the echo range to attack the player

GameToken.Name: EchoAttackDelay
GameToken.Description: Seconds - How long it takes a zombie in the echo range to attack the player

GameToken.Name: EchoRepeatEffect
GameToken.Description: Seconds - If an event repeats, reduce the time it takes for a zombie to recognize the player

GameToken.Name: Agricultural.Density
GameToken.Description: 45... Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Agricultural.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Commercial.Density
GameToken.Description: Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Commercial.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Industrial.Density
GameToken.Description: Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Industrial.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Park.Density
GameToken.Description: 35... Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Park.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Residential.Density
GameToken.Description: Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Residential.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Wilderness.Density
GameToken.Description: 20... Number of zombies for this tile type

GameToken.Name: Wilderness.IdlePercentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as Dormant (non-moving)

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type1Percentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as this freak type

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type1Tag
GameToken.Description: Tag to apply to this zombie

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type2Percentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as this freak type

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type2Tag
GameToken.Description: Tag to apply to this zombie

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type3Percentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as this freak type

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type3Tag
GameToken.Description: Tag to apply to this zombie

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type4Percentage
GameToken.Description: Pct of all zombies spawned as this freak type

GameToken.Name: Freak.Type4Tag
GameToken.Description: Tag to apply to this zombie

GameToken.Name: Threat.CurrentSoundRange
GameToken.Description: Current largest sound radius for the player.

GameToken.Name: EchoInstantAggroPercentage
GameToken.Description: Chance that a non-aggro zombie in an eccho will skip normal delays and aggro immediately
